categories.label: Spy Win (No Accusation)
categories.description: Spy earns 2 points when no one is successfully accused of being the spy by end of round

categories.label: Spy Win (Non-Spy Accused)
categories.description: Spy earns 4 points when a non-spy player is unanimously accused of being the spy

categories.label: Spy Win (Guessed Location)
categories.description: Spy earns 4 points by revealing their spy card and correctly identifying the location

categories.label: Non-Spy Win
categories.description: Each non-spy earns 1 point when the spy is successfully caught

categories.label: Non-Spy Win (Made Accusation)
categories.description: The non-spy who initiated the successful accusation earns 2 points instead of 1
